characters.flavor: 67! the chaos in 2025

characters.name: Tung Tung Tung Sahur
characters.flavor: the original brainrot and also the first brainrot made by OG Noxa

characters.name: Ballerina Cappuccina
characters.flavor: Tung tung's wife

characters.name: Tralalelo Tralala
characters.flavor: tung tung's friend who is beside the sea

characters.name: Fluri Flura
characters.flavor: flying across the sea!

characters.name: Strawberry Elephant
characters.flavor: the first "brainrot" ever made, made in 2009. The OG of all OGs.

characters.name: Lucky Block
characters.flavor: A sealed brainrot box. Buy it, stash it, then uncover it inside your collection.

characters.name: Meowl
characters.flavor: Half cat, half owl, all myth. Almost no one has ever seen one.

characters.name: Skibidi Toilet
characters.flavor: The toilet that started a war. Skibidi dop dop dop yes yes.

characters.name: Blackhole Goat
characters.flavor: A goat so powerful it bends spacetime. The admin's personal brainrot.

characters.name: La Grande Combinasion
characters.flavor: The ultimate fusion. Every brainrot combined into one supreme being.

characters.name: Guest 666
characters.flavor: The cursed guest. Legends say rolling this one changes your account forever.

characters.name: Nuclearo Dinossauro
characters.flavor: A dinosaur powered by nuclear energy. Extinction only made it stronger.

characters.name: Dragon Cannelloni
characters.flavor: The secret pasta dragon. Its flames are made of marinara and gold.

characters.name: Pot Hotspot
characters.flavor: A hotspot so hot it cooks money directly into your account.

characters.name: La Vacca Saturno Saturnita
characters.flavor: A cosmic cow floating through Saturn's rings, raining milk and money.

characters.name: Los Tralaleritos
characters.flavor: An entire squad of tiny Tralaleros. Together they sing and earn.

characters.name: Graipuss Medussi
characters.flavor: A jellyfish made of grape juice. Stings you with pure flavor and profit.

characters.name: Cocofanto Elefanto
characters.flavor: A coconut elephant hybrid from the deepest tropics. Massive and majestic.

characters.name: Girafa Celestre
characters.flavor: A giraffe that reaches into the stars. Its neck spans galaxies.

characters.name: Odin Din Din Dun
characters.flavor: The Allfather of brainrot. His ravens collect cash from every realm.

characters.name: Piccione Macchina
characters.flavor: A pigeon fused with a sports car. Coos at 200mph and prints money.

characters.name: Ballerino Lololo
characters.flavor: Ballerina Cappuccina's long-lost twin. Dances with unmatched grace.

characters.name: Frigo Camelo
characters.flavor: A camel that's also a refrigerator. Keeps your cash fresh and cold.

characters.name: Orangutini Ananassini
characters.flavor: An orangutan with pineapple flavor. Tropical primate power.

characters.name: Rhino Toasterino
characters.flavor: A rhinoceros that toasts bread with its horn. Breakfast and income secured.

characters.name: Bombardiro Crocodilo
characters.flavor: A crocodile that explodes into more crocodiles. Each one earns cash.

characters.name: Bombombini Gusini
characters.flavor: Tiny bombs with big personalities. Each explosion is profitable.

characters.name: Cavallo Virtuoso
characters.flavor: A virtuoso horse that plays symphonies. Each note is worth thousands.

characters.name: Ganganzelli Trulala
characters.flavor: Trulala's long-lost cousin from the city. Twice the style, twice the cash.

characters.name: Burbaloni Loliloli
characters.flavor: A bubble-blowing legend. Every bubble pops into dollar bills.

characters.name: Chimpanzini Bananini
characters.flavor: A chimpanzee whose bananas are solid gold. Peel carefully.

characters.name: Chef Crabracadabra
characters.flavor: A crab chef who cooks magical dishes. Each meal earns a fortune.

characters.name: Glorbo Fruttodrillo
characters.flavor: A fruit-covered crocodile. Sweet on the outside, fierce on the inside.

characters.name: Sigma Boy
characters.flavor: The ultimate sigma grindset. Doesn't chase, attracts. Especially money.

characters.name: Sigma Girl
characters.flavor: Independent, powerful, and printing cash. Sigma energy at its finest.

characters.name: Sealo Regalo
characters.flavor: A Christmas seal that brings gifts all year round. Ho ho ho, here's your cash.

characters.name: Quivioli Ameleonni
characters.flavor: A chameleon that changes color with every dollar earned. Always dazzling.

characters.name: Cappuccino Assassino
characters.flavor: A cappuccino with deadly skills. Eliminates your financial problems silently.

characters.name: Bandito Axolito
characters.flavor: An axolotl bandit who steals from the rich and gives to... you.

characters.name: Brr Brr Patapim
characters.flavor: Brr brr goes the phone. Patapim goes the cash register.

characters.name: Avocadini Antilopini
characters.flavor: An avocado-antelope hybrid. Healthy fats and fast feet.

characters.name: Trulimero Trulicina
characters.flavor: Double the trulala, double the fun. Tralalero's favorite neighbors.

characters.name: Bananita Dolphinita
characters.flavor: A banana-loving dolphin that jumps through hoops of pure profit.

characters.name: Wombo Rollo
characters.flavor: He wombo, he rollo, he makes your wallet swollo.

characters.name: Trippi Troppi
characters.flavor: Always tripping over money. Clumsy but wealthy.

characters.name: Gangster Footera
characters.flavor: The toughest foot in the game. Kicks problems away and money toward you.

characters.name: Bandito Bobritto
characters.flavor: A tiny bandit with a big attitude. Robs the bank and shares with you.

characters.name: Boneca Ambalabu
characters.flavor: A mysterious doll that whispers stock tips at midnight.

characters.name: Cacto Hipopotamo
characters.flavor: A hippo covered in cactus spines. Prickly but surprisingly generous.

characters.name: Pipi Corni
characters.flavor: A tiny corn kernel with big dreams. Cheap but every penny counts.

characters.name: Tartaragno
characters.flavor: A sleepy turtle that slowly but surely fills your wallet.

characters.name: Raccooni Jandelini
characters.flavor: A sneaky raccoon in flip-flops. Steals trash and turns it into treasure.

characters.name: Holy Arepa
characters.flavor: A blessed corn cake. Divine flavor, modest income.

characters.name: Noobini Pizzanini
characters.flavor: The very first brainrot. A noob holding pizza. Humble beginnings.

characters.name: Lirili Larila
characters.flavor: A gentle melody in brainrot form. Soft, calming, and slightly profitable.

characters.name: Tim Cheese
characters.flavor: Just a guy named Tim who really likes cheese. The cheese economy is booming.

characters.name: Talpa Di Fero
characters.flavor: An iron mole that digs through the earth and surfaces with spare change.

characters.name: Svinina Bombardino
characters.flavor: Explosive pork energy. Goes boom and leaves behind crispy bacon and coins.

sailingBoats.name: Boat for Travelers
sailingBoats.flavor: Cheap starter boat. It only has a small shot at bringing a brainrot back.

sailingBoats.name: Boat for Experts
sailingBoats.flavor: A serious brainrot hunting vessel with better odds.

sailingBoats.name: Super Boat
sailingBoats.flavor: Half your sails should come back with something strange.

sailingBoats.name: God Boat
sailingBoats.flavor: Almost every trip returns with a brainrot reward.

sailingBoats.name: Infinite Boat
sailingBoats.flavor: Guaranteed brainrot haul, with a chance to drag back a giant QA money bonus too.

sailingIslands.name: Legendary Island
sailingIslands.flavor: Home to classic brainrots that ruled the early internet. Pure nostalgia and solid income.

rewards.name: Penguino Cocosino
rewards.flavor: A penguin cracking open a coconut. Refreshingly profitable.

rewards.name: Frogo Elfo
rewards.flavor: A tiny frog with pointy elf ears. Hops through the snow dropping cash.

rewards.name: Cupcake Koala
rewards.flavor: A koala that bakes cupcakes in its sleep. Sweet, fluffy, and worth every bite.

sailingIslands.name: Unknown Island
sailingIslands.flavor: A spooky fog-shrouded island where witch-fused brainrots wash ashore.

rewards.name: Mummio Rappitto
rewards.flavor: A mummified rabbit that still hops. Ancient Egyptian brainrot energy.

rewards.name: Quackula
rewards.flavor: A vampire duck that quacks at midnight. Drains blood and prints money.

rewards.name: Jacko Spaventosa
rewards.flavor: A pumpkin-headed scarecrow. Spooky, scary, and surprisingly rich.

rewards.name: Tentacolo Tecnico
rewards.flavor: A tech-savvy octopus from the deep. Its tentacles wire money directly to your account.
